title: lithocarpus aculeatus
intro: Lithocarpus aculeatus, also known as the Bur oak or hickory, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus aculeatus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help with cardiovascular health and the prevention of certain types of cancer. Lithocarpus aculeatus is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and decoctions, to create a range of remedies that can be used to treat various health conditions.
